description:
**Problem**
After the main decomposition, several loose ends remain:
1. New crates (\`beads-git\`, expanded \`beads-daemon\`, expanded \`beads-daemon-core\`) need AGENTS.md files describing their role and boundaries
2. \`beads_stateright_models/\` examples import \`beads_rs::daemon::*\` — needs updating to \`beads_daemon\` or \`beads_daemon_core\`
3. \`fuzz/fuzz_targets/\` import daemon internals (repl_message_decode.rs, wal_decode.rs) — needs updating
4. \`crates/beads-rs/src/model/\` has coupling to daemon types (see non-cli-daemon-coupling-inventory.md) — decide if model/ moves or stays
5. Remove compat shims from beads-rs once all consumers updated (\`pub use beads_git::*\` etc.)

**Design**
Fix each item. Most are import path changes. AGENTS.md files should follow the existing pattern (see \`crates/beads-core/src/AGENTS.md\` for example).

**Acceptance**
- [ ] AGENTS.md in \`crates/beads-git/\`, updated in \`crates/beads-daemon/\`, updated in \`crates/beads-daemon-core/\`
- [ ] Zero \`beads_rs::daemon::*\` imports in stateright models
- [ ] Zero \`beads_rs::daemon::*\` imports in fuzz targets
- [ ] \`model/\` module ownership decided and implemented
- [ ] All compat shims (\`pub use beads_git::*\` etc.) removed from beads-rs
- [ ] \`cargo check --workspace\` passes
- [ ] \`cargo test --workspace\` passes

**Files:** \`crates/beads-git/AGENTS.md\` (new), \`crates/beads-daemon/src/AGENTS.md\`, \`crates/beads-daemon-core/src/AGENTS.md\`, \`crates/beads_stateright_models/examples/*.rs\`, \`crates/fuzz/fuzz_targets/*.rs\`, \`crates/beads-rs/src/model/\`, \`crates/beads-rs/src/git/mod.rs\` (remove shim)
title: Update AGENTS.md files + fix stateright/fuzz/model daemon imports
